_meta.source: Wave I verification swarm (3 agents, 15 buildings)
_meta.note: VERIFIED_AS_LISTED = price + unit-type match. VERIFIED_DIFFERENT = building real but our price/unit-type wrong. STALE = our price doesn't match current listings.

65_windermere.honest_note: Real Greenwin building + 2mo free promo, but our $1,549 is the BACHELOR price. Real 1BR starts at $1,625. Still a deal.

marina_view_2303.honest_note: Real Greenwin-style waterfront building. $1,400 is the STUDIO floor. 1BRs are $1,650-1,900. 1mo free promo active.

363_lakeshore_e.honest_note: Our $1,500 is NOT verifiable anywhere. Real 1BRs are posting $1,845-$1,925 (Realtor.ca, condos.ca). Do NOT anchor on $1,500.

60_mountview.honest_note: Beaux Properties, listing 1 day old, utilities INCLUDED. Worth calling (289) 819-7203 this week. Note: tiny 515sqft.

beechwood_480_lakeshore_e.honest_note: Real building, price matches. Utilities ALL included (gas/water/hydro/heat/internet/trash). Tradeoff: 465sqft tiny, no in-unit laundry.

17_rowland_st.honest_note: M6P 1M2 = semi/detached houses street. $2,050 with utilities+WiFi bundle = almost certainly a basement/secondary suite, NOT a building. No major-aggregator listing found.

70_high_park_ave.honest_note: 20-unit condo building, sublet model varies per unit. Our $1,950 is the floor. Recent comp $2,175 / 550sqft / Mar 2026.

grenadier_square_40_high_park.honest_note: $1,906 = NET-after-1-month-free rate ($2,079 × 11/12). Real ask $2,025-$2,044. GWLR professional management, utilities NOT included. Year-2 rent ~8% jump when promo ends.

old_mill_station_2675_bloor.honest_note: PadMapper listing exists, location confirmed 2-min to Old Mill subway. 800sqft for $2,290 is large for area (luxury condos start $2,850) — suggests older mid-century low-rise. Phone verify.

the_campbell_299_campbell.honest_note: $2,025 = NET-after-1-month-free. Real ask $2,070-$2,170. CURRENTLY ZERO UNITS AVAILABLE — must call (844) 948-1836 + waitlist. July 1 move-in promo deadline imminent.

143_stephen_drive.honest_note: MetCap-managed. Heat included only (not all utilities). Coin laundry, covered parking (cost unposted). $2.87/sqft best value in Stonegate zone.

aquaview_3865_lake_shore_w.honest_note: STALE COMP from previous lease cycle. Current 1BR / 1BR+den $2,300-$2,695. DROP from short-list at our claimed price — at $2,300+ it's no longer a value play.

waterford_tower_2645_battleford.honest_note: EXACT match. QuadReal-managed. Promo: 'Move In by July 1: 2 Months Free + 12 Months Free Parking + No LMR Upfront' on SELECT suites, new applicants only. Effective ~$1,850/mo year 1. JULY 1 DEADLINE imminent. Heat+A/C+water included, in-suite laundry.

reid_drive.honest_note: Our $2,170 not visible anywhere. Current asks $2,399 (rentals.ca) to $2,599+ (InterRent direct). 1BR may have zero availability. Parking $75/mo extra. Phone verify.

lakeshore_206e.actual_unit_type: TRUE STUDIO 435sqft (no 1BR exists at this building)
lakeshore_206e.honest_note: Confirmed building only has studios + 2BRs. The $1,649 is a real 435sqft studio. Promo: 1mo free + 6mo parking on 13-mo lease. Effective ~$1,586/mo year 1 (~$200 extras: hydro, water, parking, locker).
